spectral_action_on_5manifold.expansion: Tr f(D/Lambda) ~ Lambda^5 f_5 a_0 + Lambda^3 f_3 a_2 + Lambda^1 f_1 a_4
spectral_action_on_5manifold.every_coefficient_carries: pi^3 = Vol(S^5) as a multiplicative factor

verdict_summary: pi^3 = Vol(S^5) is the natural integration measure factor in EVERY SD coefficient on S^5, so any spectral-action observable inherits a multiplicative pi^3. However, no SD coefficient on S^5 produces a contribution at order alpha^3 against the leading 1/alpha of K. The numerical match R_predict ~ pi^3 alpha^3 is therefore consistent with the Vol(S^5) = pi^3 identity but is NOT structurally derived from any specific Paper 24 spectral-action coefficient.
